cargo_toml:
[package]
name = "mv_impl"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[[bin]]
name = "util"
path = "src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
libc = "0.2"
deps_rationale: The implementation uses only the libc crate for Linux/POSIX interfaces that std does not expose directly, namely isatty for GNU-like interactive prompting and renameat2 for --exchange. It implements the common mv flags from the page, while intentionally skipping SELinux context handling, xattrs/ACLs, sparse/reflink behavior, and deep preservation details outside the requested scope.
